subject: Implement adaptive polling in poll-for-results.sh
description:
Modify the existing `poll-for-results.sh` script to use adaptive polling intervals instead of fixed 15-second intervals. This serves as the fallback when `watch-for-results.sh` reports tools unavailable (exit code 2).

**What to implement:**

1. Read current `claude/sdd-tools/scripts/poll-for-results.sh` (~61 lines)
2. Modify polling logic:
   - Start at 5-second interval (configurable via `POLL_START_INTERVAL`, default: 5)
   - Increase by 5 seconds after each poll round with no new results
   - Cap at 30 seconds (configurable via `POLL_MAX_INTERVAL`, default: 30)
   - Reset to start interval when a new result is found
   - Cumulative timeout via `POLL_TIMEOUT` env var (default: 2700 = 45 min)
   - Interval progression: 5s → 10s → 15s → 20s → 25s → 30s → 30s → ...
3. Maintain same output format as watch-for-results.sh:
   - `RESULT_FOUND: result-task-{id}.md (N/M)`
   - `ALL_DONE`
4. Maintain same exit codes: 0 (all found), 1 (timeout)
5. Maintain same argument interface: `<session_dir> <expected_count> [task_ids...]`

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/scripts/poll-for-results.sh` (~61 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Polling starts at 5-second intervals (or POLL_START_INTERVAL)
- [ ] Interval increases by 5s after each poll with no new results
- [ ] Maximum interval caps at 30s (or POLL_MAX_INTERVAL)
- [ ] Interval resets to start value when new result found
- [ ] Cumulative timeout at 45 min (or POLL_TIMEOUT)
- [ ] Output format matches watch-for-results.sh (RESULT_FOUND / ALL_DONE)

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] POLL_START_INTERVAL=10 correctly starts at 10s
- [ ] POLL_MAX_INTERVAL=15 correctly caps at 15s
- [ ] All results found on first poll → immediate ALL_DONE

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Timeout → exit code 1
- [ ] Invalid environment variable values → use defaults

**Testing Requirements:**
• Shell (bats): Adaptive interval increase (5s, 10s, 15s, 20s, 25s, 30s)
• Shell (bats): Interval reset on new result found
• Shell (bats): Max interval cap at 30s
• Shell (bats): Environment variable override (POLL_START_INTERVAL=10)
• Shell (bats): Timeout → exit 1

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.8
